name: lib
description: A library agent that owns a book-catalog shelf-code record set and a string-utilities library. Answers catalog/shelf lookups and adds/changes string helpers in its own folder.

skills.name: Shelf-code lookup
skills.description: Find a book in the catalog by title and report its canonical shelf code.

skills.name: String utilities
skills.description: Add or change slug/text-formatting helpers in the library's strings module.
